mapper.sql: id, name, type, amount, discount, min_amount, total_count, received_count, used_count, valid_start_time, valid_end_time, status, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: SELECT c.* FROM coupons c WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.status = 1 AND c.valid_start_time <= #{now} AND c.valid_end_time >= #{now} AND c.received_count < c.total_count AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_coupons uc WHERE uc.coupon_id = c.id AND uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.deleted_at IS NULL ) ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE coupons SET received_count = received_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND received_count < total_count
UPDATE coupons SET used_count = used_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND used_count > 0
